title: 1.1: Tests rewrapping with same width including multiple height variations in a single test
1.2: Tests rewrapping to wider buffer with soft-wrapped content that should merge
1.3: Tests rewrapping to narrower buffer verifying lines split with correct continued flags
2.1: Places the test for same-width rewrap behavior in kitty_tests/datatypes.py
2.2: Places the test for wider buffer rewrap behavior in kitty_tests/datatypes.py
2.3: Places the test for narrower buffer rewrap behavior in kitty_tests/datatypes.py
3.1: All tests use Python unittest framework as methods within the TestDataTypes class
3.3: All tests use self.ae() assertion method for comparisons
4.1: Uses self.rewrap() helper method to perform rewrap operations
4.2: Uses line_comparison_rewrap helper for tests that verify line content after width changes
4.3: Uses assertContinued helper to verify is_continued flag patterns after rewrap
